---
title: "STAT-302 Homepage"
author: David Gerard
---

[Syllabus](./syllabus.qmd)

- Chapter 1:
  - [R and Data Frames](./01_r/01_r_intro.qmd)
  - [R Graphics](./01_r/01_ggplot.qmd)
  - [202 Review](./02_review/02_stat_202_review.qmd)
- Chapter 2:
  - One- and Two-sample t-tests
- Chapter 3: 
  - t-assumptions
- Chapter 4: 
  - Nonparameterics
- Chapter 5:
  - One-way ANOVA
- Chapter 13:
  - Two-way ANOVA
- Chapter 6:
  - Multiple Comparisons
- Chapters 7--9
  - Simple Linear Regression
- Chapters 9--11:
  - Multiple Regression
- Chapter 20:
  - Logistic Regression
- Chapter 18:
  - Proportions/odds
- Chapter 19:
  - Two-way Tables
